identities.name: Transition Metal Color Logic
identities.logic: Predicting color based on d-d transitions and unpaired electrons. Trap: Sc3+ and Zn2+ which are colorless.

identities.name: Colligative Property Van't Hoff Fusion
identities.logic: ΔTb = kb * m * i. Linking boiling point elevation with degree of dissociation.

identities.name: Aldol vs Cannizzaro Discrimination
identities.logic: Presence of alpha-hydrogen vs no alpha-hydrogen. Common trap involving benzaldehyde vs acetaldehyde mixtures.

identities.name: Crystal Field Splitting Energy (CFSE)
identities.logic: Δo vs P. Predicting high spin vs low spin for octahedral complexes. KCET favors Co(III) and Fe(II) complexes.

identities.name: Solubility Product (Ksp) Common Ion Trap
identities.logic: Calculating solubility in the presence of a common ion from a strong electrolyte. Quadratic vs Approximation logic.

identities.name: Inorganic Order of Radii/IE/EA
identities.logic: Exceptional trends in Group 13 and Group 16. Comparing EA of Cl vs F is a staple.

traps.name: Concentration Unit Trap
traps.description: Using Normality (N) instead of Molarity (M) in titration calculations without adjusting for n-factor.

traps.name: Stereoisomer Count
traps.description: Asking for 'Number of optical isomers' vs 'Total stereoisomers' (including meso).
